actionUnits.condition: Verification of component mapping: This GameObject has a BoxCollider (no Rigidbody, no EventTrigger). MonoBehaviour_0 in the scene uses m_Script guid 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d (Fire), matching the provided Fire.cs. Serialized fields (e.g., timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, totalHitTime=5, onNeighborsThreshold=2, mainEffectGo=fileID 1849464941111748095) align with the script’s fields. Note: There are no public parameterless methods to call directly.

Ignition via neighbors (automatic behavior): To exercise CheckNeighborState->shouldTurnOn path and time-based turn-on, provide at least 2 Fire neighbors within maxNeighborDistance (4) of this object, with at least one positioned lower than this object by > minNeighborDownDistance (3) to validate downMultiplier. Ensure those neighbors’ isOn=true so onNeighbors>=onNeighborsThreshold. Expected: This instance sets shouldTurnOn=true and, after timeToOn (randomly set to 40-60 in Awake), becomes isOn=true and UpdateFireState(true) plays particles and notifies neighbors. NOTE: Because timeToOn is randomized to 40-60 at runtime, a shorter configurable value or test hook is needed to complete this within a practical test duration.

Extinguish by water hits: Precondition: fire is currently isOn=true (either via neighbor ignition or manual SetIsOn(true)). Apply repeated water hits so that each hit occurs within maxHitInterval (2s), accumulating currentHitTime to exceed totalHitTime (5s). Expected: isOn toggles to false; UpdateFireState(true) stops particles, notifies neighbors, and calls FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1). NOTE: Requires ability to invoke Fire.WaterHit(Vector3) or a water system that calls it—no public parameterless method exists to trigger this directly.

Abort extinguish attempt: Precondition: fire is isOn=true. Apply a single water hit, then wait longer than maxHitInterval (2s) without additional hits. Expected: isTurningOff resets to false and currentHitTime resets to 0, and fire remains on. NOTE: Requires ability to invoke Fire.WaterHit(Vector3).

Manual on/off without neighbor notification: Call SetIsOn(true) and then SetIsOn(false) to exercise UpdateFireState(false) path (no neighbor notification). Expected: Particle system play/stop without NotifyAllNeighbors calls. NOTE: SetIsOn(bool) is parameterized and cannot be triggered via the provided no-arg Trigger mechanism.
